Course Title: AI in Travel Planning: Misinformation Risks
Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Travel agents, tour operators, travel consultants, hotel concierges, tourism coordinators, customer service representatives, travel planners
Team or Dept this is for: Customer Service, Sales, Operations, Marketing, Guest Relations
Prerequisites: Learners should have basic familiarity with using the internet and a general interest in travel planning, though no prior knowledge of artificial intelligence is required.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common types of misinformation that AI tools can produce when generating travel itineraries, and explain why these errors occur and how they can mislead travellers. You will also apply practical strategies to verify AI-generated travel advice, recognise unreliable recommendations, and confidently cross-check information before sharing it with clients or using it to plan a trip.
